title: Mineverse mining action response — WRITE contract v1 (TEST GUILD ONLY)
description: The bot-side executor's answer to a mining action proposal (schemas/mining_action.v1.schema.json). Contract prose: docs/mining-write-contract.md — the reason_code taxonomy, HTTP status mapping, idempotency and audit semantics live there. Versioning: additive-only within v1; breaking changes ship a new mining_action_response.v2.schema.json.

contract_version.description: WRITE-contract major version, mirroring the request. v1 is exactly the string "1".

action_id.description: Echo of the proposal's idempotency key (lowercase UUID v4).

reason_code.description: Machine-readable outcome from the CLOSED taxonomy (docs/mining-write-contract.md maps each to an HTTP status). Exactly "ok" on accept; never "ok" on reject — both directions enforced below.

message.description: Human-readable explanation, safe to surface in the web UI.

replayed.description: true iff this response was served from the idempotency store (same action_id + same body inside the retention window) instead of a fresh execution.

result.description: Present iff status is "accepted" (enforced below): what changed, and the read-contract freshness pointer.

state_delta.description: The miner fields this action changed, with their NEW values, using READ-contract (mining_player_state) field names — e.g. {"depth": 2, "coins": 18470}. Open on keys: any per-miner read-contract field may appear.

snapshot_generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC instant: the generated_at the next READ-contract snapshot reflecting this action will carry or exceed (ties the write back to the read contract's staleness semantics).
